titleStmt.title: SII 29.244: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 244. (A.R. No. B. 483 of 1961-62.) KABBŪR, CHIKKODI TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record mentions mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Kartīvīrya-devarasa ruling from the capital Veḷugrama. It registers a gift of money derived from the sale of horses to the god svayambhudēvachakravarti Kalidēvasvāmi of piriya agrahāra Kabbūr by the Hēḷāvida (?) headed by Tikkayya, Anatuma-nāyaka and Hollaya-nāyaka and others.
The record is dated saka 1126, Dundubhi. The Śaka year 1126 donot correspond with the cyclic year Dundubhi. The cyclic year Raktākshi occurred in Śaka 1126 and that of Dundubhi in Śaka 1124.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
— namaḥ sivāyaḥ . namastuṁga (śiraścuṁbi*)caṁdra
cāmaracāruvē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūla
staṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti śrī manmahāpaho
māna sarvvanamasyada piriyagrahāra kabūra śrī
svayaṁbhu dēva cakravarti kalidēvasvāmi dēvargge śrī
manmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ kārttivīryya dēvarasaru vēḷugrā
meya nelevīḍinalu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyyuttamire sakavarṣa 1126 neya duṁdubhi saṁva
tsaradalu hēḷāvida tikkayya Anatuma nāyaka ho
llayanāyaka jāyigoṭṭu Iṁtivaru mukhyavāgi (seṭṭa)
ṣṭa hēḷāvidaru māṟida kudurevoṁdake biṭṭāya paṇa
Digital edition of SII 29.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
